title: Monumenta Cakedition
description: ye another monumenta client modpack. Now it's for 1.20.4.
body:
![Banner Image](https://github.com/HarrytheCake/Monumenta-Cakedition/blob/main/1.19.4/resource/titlemonumenta.png?raw=true) *Yet Another monumenta client modpack. 欸對，又是一個monumenta的模組包。* ## What does it have - ### Performance > Monumenta Cakedition provides you decent performance boost , thanks to great mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) , [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) and many more! - ### QoL > Mainly [Unofficial Monumenta Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/unofficial-monumenta-mod) and map mods like [xaeros minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap-fair) and inventory HUD like [Invhud](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-hud-forge) . Also Teammate's health indicator [usbplus](https://modrinth.com/mod/usbplus) and [Monumenta Item Dictionary](https://modrinth.com/mod/monumenta-item-dictionary) . There still have some minor ones! - ### Minimum Unnecessary Graphic Enhance > This pack don't came up with too much graphic enhancement mods so it can reduce the impact to performance by some. But still , the shader mod [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) is installed and come with a great shader pack [complementary-reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)! - ### Customized Features > The [fancymenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancymenu/version/2.14.9-1.12-1.12.2-forge) provides awesome customized for menus options , and [advancedchathud](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancedchathud) giving the feature to channelize in minecraft chat!
Images of Features! ![Main Menu](https://github.com/HarrytheCake/Monumenta-Cakedition/blob/main/1.19.4/resource/mainscreen.png?raw=true) ![Quest Browser](https://github.com/HarrytheCake/Monumenta-Cakedition/blob/main/1.19.4/resource/questscreen.png?raw=true) ![Chat Tabs](https://github.com/HarrytheCake/Monumenta-Cakedition/blob/main/1.19.4/resource/chatchannel.png?raw=true)
## Useful Links **Download Official Resource Pack from [here](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/monumenta-mmo-resource-pack/files)**
Contact me on [Monumenta Discord](https://discord.gg/monumenta) server or [Unofficial Monumenta qq](http://qm.qq.com/cgi-bin/qm/qr?_wv=1027&k=HuISJO6q-9qxvbFKs-zh6_cL8E4ESf8p&authKey=v%2B8i%2Be%2BtXWfa4gB%2BjS1q0UeG7TmroP9hMEiwbW7xCLV3VkIwGeOFAzUyrKi3TMNu&noverify=0&group_code=588414395) group for issues and suggestions.
GithubPage(WIP) ## Mod List You can find the mods list from [versions](https://modrinth.com/modpack/monucake/versions) (scroll down a bit) . Underneath is the mods aren't in modrinth.
External Mods! [advancementinfo](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/advancementinfo)
[ToroHealth Damage Indicators](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/torohealth-damage-indicators) ([1.19.4 Version](https://github.com/ToroCraft/ToroHealth/pull/171))
[InvHud](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-hud-forge)
[malilib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/malilib)
## Credits Thanks [gensokyo-reimagined-qol](https://modrinth.com/modpack/gensokyo-reimagined-qol) for configurations of many mods.
Thanks Moe_Muyo , ProbsWinter for texture support.
Thanks [Paperboxes](https://www.pixiv.net/en/users/21257681) for background image.
Thanks [Monumenta Wiki](https://monumenta.wiki.gg/wiki/Monumenta_Wiki) for ingame quest viewer source. ## Disclamer This modpack is not affiliated with Unofficial Monumenta Mod or any other mod included or Monumenta. **Do not** report any modpack related bugs or issues to them. Report them directly to me instead.
